page.title: Intangible Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Documentation

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財]]
[[File:Tokaichi Aizuwakamatsu.JPG|280px|thumb|right|Selected as a "Folk Cultural Property Requiring Measures for Documentation," citizens at {{ill|Tōkaichi|ja|十日市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaichi|1=Q11405070|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405070}} in {{ill|Aizuwakamatsu|en|Aizuwakamatsu|qid=Q237699|lt=Aizuwakamatsu|1=Aizuwakamatsu}} purchase {{ill|Okiagari-koboshi|en|Okiagari-koboshi|qid=Q769814|lt=Okiagari-koboshi|1=Okiagari-koboshi}}.]] '''Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation''' (記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財, ''Kiroku Sakusei-tō no Sochi o Kōzubeki Mukei no Minzoku Bunka-zai'') refer to intangible {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in Japan, excluding those designated as {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=National Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6573893}} or {{ill|Registered Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|登録無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Registered Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=Registered Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q112228211}}. These properties are selected by the {{ill|Agency for Cultural Affairs|en|Agency for Cultural Affairs|qid=Q1009519|lt=Agency for Cultural Affairs|1=Agency for Cultural Affairs}} based on recommendations by the {{ill|Council for Cultural Affairs|ja|文化審議会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Council for Cultural Affairs|1=Council for Cultural Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11499811}} and are eligible for public funding assistance for documentation, preservation, and public access. They are commonly referred to as "Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Properties" (選択無形民俗文化財, ''Sentaku Mukei Minzoku Bunka-zai'').
This article explains the national selection process for "Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation." Note that some {{ill|Local Government|ja|地方公共団体|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Local Government|1=local public entity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q27116296}} bodies, such as {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}} and {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, have independently selected similarly named cultural properties based on their own ordinances.<ref>[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/03/x4510002.html Cultural Properties of Gunma] (Gunma Prefecture)</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/f2216/bunkazai-kensu.html List of National and Prefectural Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture] (Saitama Prefecture)</ref>.
== Overview == The {{ill|Commissioner for Cultural Affairs|ja|文化庁長官|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Commissioner for Cultural Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 文化庁|1=Agency for Cultural Affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1009519}} can select intangible folk cultural properties that are not classified as Important or Registered Intangible Folk Cultural Properties but are considered particularly necessary for documentation, preservation, or public access. The national government may subsidize part of the costs required for documentation, preservation, and public dissemination of these properties, as stipulated in Article 77 of the {{ill|Law for the Protection of Cultural Properties|ja|文化財保護法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Law for the Protection of Cultural Properties|1=Cultural Properties Protection Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1188502}}, applied via Article 91. These properties are referred to as "Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation" (not a legal term). For classification details, see the {{ill|Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q858308|lt=Cultural Properties of Japan|1=Cultural Property (Japan)}} article.
== Selection Criteria == The "Selection Criteria for Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation"<ref>Announcement No. 59, 1954 by the Cultural Properties Protection Committee; last revised on March 28, 2005, by Announcement No. 12 of the Agency for Cultural Affairs.</ref> stipulate the following:
* 1. Customs and Practices: ** (1) Those that typify foundational aspects of Japanese culture through origin, content, or other features. ** (2) Events such as annual rituals, festivals, and ceremonies representing the basis of performing arts. * 2. Folk Performing Arts: ** (1) Demonstrating the origin or formation of performing arts. ** (2) Indicating the evolutionary process of performing arts. ** (3) Highlighting regional characteristics. * 3. Folk Techniques: ** (1) Illustrating the origin or formation of techniques. ** (2) Showing the evolution of techniques. ** (3) Representing regional characteristics. * 4. Properties aiding the understanding of {{ill|Important Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|重要有形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=National Important Tangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644858}} but not covered under the above. * 5. Properties related to non-Japanese cultures that are significant in understanding Japanese cultural life.
== Selection Status == As of March 22, 2023, 654 items have been selected under these criteria. The classification is as follows:
* Customs and Practices: ** Production and Livelihood: 49 items ** Life and Rituals: 15 items ** Entertainment and Competitions: 15 items ** Social Life (Folk Knowledge): 12 items ** Annual Events: 63 items ** Festivals (Faith): 110 items ** Clothing, Food, and Shelter: 1 item ** Others: 0 items * Folk Performing Arts: ** Sacred Music and Dance (''Kagura''): 67 items ** Rice-Planting Dances (''Dengaku''): 44 items ** Processional Entertainment (''Fūryū''): 124 items ** Narrative Arts and Blessing Performances: 8 items ** Other Ritual Performances (''Ennen''): 14 items ** Imported or Stage Arts: 81 items ** Others: 38 items * Folk Techniques: ** Production and Livelihood: 11 items ** Clothing, Food, and Shelter: 1 item ** Others: 0 items
== References == <references />
== Bibliography == * Notice No. 320 (December 27, 2004) and No. 413 (March 28, 2005), Agency for Cultural Affairs * "Special Feature: New Developments in Cultural Property Administration," Monthly Cultural Property, Issue 500, May 2005, {{ill|Daiichi Hōki|ja|第一法規|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiichi Hōki|1=Daiichi Hōki Shuppan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11602086}}
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q858308|lt=Cultural Properties of Japan|1=Cultural Property (Japan)}} * {{ill|Folk Cultural Properties|ja|民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Properties|1=Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24895900}} * {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=National Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6573893}} * {{ill|Important Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|重要有形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=National Important Tangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644858}} * {{ill|Registered Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|ja|登録有形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Registered Tangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=Registered Tangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11579196}} * {{ill|Ethnographic Materials|ja|民俗資料|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ethnographic Materials|1=folk materials|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547891}} * {{ill|Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Properties Requiring Measures for Documentation|1=Intangible Cultural Properties that need measures such as documentation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11642583}}
== External Links == * [https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/law/325AC0100000214 Law for the Protection of Cultural Properties] * [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/index National Cultural Property Database]
{{Cultural Properties of Japan}}
